raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California's power grid is over 100 years old.",
    "California will need an estimated 15,000 miles of new transmission lines in the next 30 years to modernize its power grid.",
    "The California Independent System Operator estimates more than $30 billion in new transmission capacity will be needed by 2040.",
    "Princeton's Net-Zero America study predicts California's transmission capacity would need to triple by 2050.",
    "Lawsuits filed against transmission projects delay construction.",
    "Environmental Leadership Development Projects benefit from a quicker judicial review of lawsuits, requiring cases to be resolved in 270 days.",
    "Transmissions projects currently undergo a duplicative economic review at the Public Utilities Commission.",
    "The duplicative economic review can add three to four years to the construction timeline of transmission projects.",
    "SB 420's approach aims to provide all transmission projects access to an expedited judicial review system.",
    "The duplicative economic review at the PUC would be effectively eliminated under SB 420."
  ]
}
```
